question: A 65-year-old woman with newly diagnosed metastatic EGFR-mutated NSCLC is being considered for first-line therapy. Which of the following agents would be most appropriate as initial systemic therapy?

Based on the results of the DESTINY-Breast03 trial, what is the preferred second-line treatment for patients with HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer who have progressed on trastuzumab and a taxane?
Which of the following biomarkers should be tested in all patients with newly diagnosed metastatic colorectal cancer to guide treatment selection?
correct_answer: RAS and BRAF mutation status, and MSI/MMR status

question: A patient receiving pembrolizumab develops grade 2 pneumonitis. What is the most appropriate management?
